_meta.source: Proclamation No. 1006 (signed 2025-09-03) by President Ferdinand R. Marcos Jr.; Eid'l Fitr declared by Proclamation 1189; Eid'l Adha pending separate proclamation.
_meta.authority: Republic Act No. 9492 (Holiday Economics Act) as amended; annual executive proclamation by the Office of the President.
notes: Eid'l Adha 2026 has not yet been formally proclaimed (as of 2026-05-21). When proclaimed (typically ~late May / early June), append it to this file and bump the package patch version.
Holiday TYPE matters for labor pay rules: regular holidays pay 200% base if worked; special non-working days pay 130%; special working days pay 100% (no premium).
Cities/provinces may declare additional local holidays not covered here.

holidays.name: 40th Anniversary of the EDSA People Power Revolution
Feast of the Immaculate Conception of Mary
